goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'nightclub'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'address', and 'area'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'ely' and should 'arrive by 11:30'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of nightclub
Make sure you get phone number, address, and area
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to ely and should arrive by 11:30
The train should leave on sunday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get travel time and train ID
